topic: What else to analyse for immigration project beyond done work + prior brainstorm

ideas.title: Sending-country welfare ledger
ideas.transfer_mechanism: World Bank emigration data + remittance flows + UN comtrade
ideas.data_source: WB Bilateral Remittances, IMF BOP, INEGI Mexico, ENCOVI Guatemala

ideas.title: Comparative international regimes (Gulf Kafala, Canada points, Germany 2015 surge)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: OECD IMD, MPI country profiles
ideas.data_source: OECD International Migration Outlook, MPI Migration Data Hub

ideas.title: Court case-law evolution text analysis 1965-2024
ideas.transfer_mechanism: Caselaw Access Project + INS/USCIS regulatory text
ideas.novelty_vs_prior: medium — repo touches but doesn't quantify

ideas.title: Border-as-produced (De Genova legal-regime)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: Conceptual reframing + INS/CBP reorganization timing
ideas.data_source: DHS reorg events, IRCA/IIRIRA/USA PATRIOT/SAFETY Act

ideas.title: Tipping-point / phase transition (Card-Mas-Rothstein on neighborhood share)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: ACS PUMA panel + threshold-detection methods

ideas.title: Cohort/vintage effects + 6-yr Foged-Peri latent period replication for US
ideas.transfer_mechanism: Survival analysis / cohort cross-section
ideas.data_source: ACS PUMS by year-of-entry × current year

ideas.title: Niche partitioning (Peri-Sparber tasks formalized at MSA level)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: O*NET task vectors × ACS occupation × nativity

ideas.title: Real-options migration model — enforcement raises strike price, not cuts flow at margin
ideas.transfer_mechanism: Coyote price series × CBP apprehensions × wage gap

ideas.title: Zoning code stringency as instrument for elasticity (Wharton WRLURI)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: WRLURI 2018 update merged with rent panels
ideas.data_source: Wharton Residential Land Use Regulation Index 2018

ideas.title: Defense-in-depth cost curves: $/marginal-deterred-migrant by venue (border vs interior vs workplace vs benefits)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: DHS budget by program × apprehension/deport stats

ideas.title: Open-borders calibration — Clemens place-premium scaled with binding-constraint identification
ideas.transfer_mechanism: World Bank wage gap × global stock × US absorption capacity

ideas.title: Mass-deportation 11M-scale counterfactual — industry-by-industry output
ideas.transfer_mechanism: BEA I-O tables × industry FB-share × short-run elasticities
ideas.data_source: BEA Use Table, BLS OEUS, ACS occupation share

ideas.title: Time runs backward — 1900-1950 waves, IRCA 1986, IIRIRA 1996. Multi-generational convergence.
ideas.transfer_mechanism: Abramitzky-Boustan linked Census; current Hispanic gen-1/2/3 vs Italian/Irish 1900/1950/2000

ideas.title: Diversity Visa lottery RCT — true random assignment
ideas.transfer_mechanism: State Dept lottery winner data, ACS for outcomes
ideas.data_source: DOS Visa Bulletin + ACS PUMS by entry-cohort

ideas.title: Sanctuary city natural experiment — staggered adoption, ~600 jurisdictions
ideas.transfer_mechanism: ILRC Sanctuary Map + crime reporting + school enrollment

ideas.title: Immigration judge IV — judge fixed effects on asylum/bond
ideas.transfer_mechanism: EOIR case-level data, judge-level random assignment within court

ideas.title: Internal-native migration as comparison group (WV→Pittsburgh = MEX→Pittsburgh test)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: ACS migration table × IRS SOI native flows

ideas.title: Health and mortality — immigrant health paradox + immigrant care provision
ideas.transfer_mechanism: CDC NVSS, MEPS, BLS care-worker occupations

ideas.title: Endogenous native fertility response in immigrant-receiving areas (Borjas-Hanson)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: CDC NCHS Vital Stats × MSA panel × FB share

ideas.title: Innovation/entrepreneurship — patent and firm-formation by founder nativity
ideas.transfer_mechanism: USPTO inventor surveys + Census BDS founder data
ideas.data_source: USPTO, Census BDS Annual Survey of Entrepreneurs

ideas.title: Marriage market integration (intermarriage as 'still separate in 30 years' test)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: ACS MARRINP × HISP × generation

ideas.title: Climate-driven migration projection (NTCA / Caribbean future flows)
ideas.transfer_mechanism: IDMC + UNHCR + NOAA climate scenarios
ideas.data_source: IDMC GRID, UNHCR Refugee Data, NOAA CMIP6

ideas.title: Long-run linked microdata: 1980/1990 cohort → 2020 outcomes
ideas.transfer_mechanism: Census FSRDC linked records, IRS-SSA-Census panels

merges.rationale: fertility + linked microdata both probe long-run demographic outcomes
